analysis.A_filesystem_access: No filesystem paths derived from tool arguments in this diff. Not applicable.
analysis.B_secret_isolation: No changes to childEnv() or child environment construction. recently-created-by-claude.ts reads XERO_USER_NAME (per-user env var, not the signing secret). PASS.
analysis.C_write_tool_gating: update-invoice and update-credit-note remain write tools; only description text changed. verify-confirmation-gate 10/10 including update-invoice. PASS.
analysis.D_authn_authz: wasRecentlyCreatedByCurrentUser: (1) hasAuthenticatedUserName() guard blocks anonymous/Unknown-user sessions from cross-matching; (2) identity matched against XERO_USER_NAME, a trusted per-session env var set by the session handler; (3) fails closed on any API error. This is a change-control rail (§3.2), not an authorization boundary — updates still run under the caller's own per-user Xero OAuth token, so no cross-user security boundary is crossed (§3.1). Display-name uniqueness limitation is documented and accepted. PASS.
analysis.E_query_injection: resourceId used as a typed SDK path parameter, not interpolated into a query/filter DSL. Same-tenant scope; below threshold even if injectable (§2.E, §4). PASS.
analysis.F_ssrf: No new outbound requests with user-controlled host or protocol. PASS.
analysis.G_deploy_iam: No changes to deploy scripts or GitHub Actions workflows. PASS.
analysis.H_docker_build: No changes to Dockerfile, .dockerignore, package.json dependencies, or lifecycle scripts. PASS.
